name: Harshvardhan
resumeText:

Professional Summary
Detail-oriented Java Developer with hands-on experience in building RESTful backend appli-
cations using Spring Boot, Hibernate, and MySQL. Strong understanding of object-oriented
programming, database design, and clean code practices. Seeking an entry-level software devel-
oper role to contribute to scalable and efficient applications.
Technical Skills
ÔÇó Programming Languages: Java, JavaScript , SQL
ÔÇó Frameworks: Spring Boot, React , Hibernate

ÔÇó Databases: MySQL
ÔÇó Tools: Git, GitHub, Maven, Eclipse, VS Code
Projects
Employee Management System Java, Spring Boot, MySQL
ÔÇó Developed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot for employee management operations.
ÔÇó Implemented layered architecture (Controller, Service, Repository) to ensure clean code struc-
ture.
ÔÇó Integrated MySQL database using Spring Data JPA and Hibernate ORM.
ÔÇó Added exception handling and validation to improve application reliability.
ÔÇó Used Git and GitHub for version control and project collaboration.
